title: Add cache invalidation middleware
description: Create cache invalidation middleware that intercepts POST/PUT/DELETE requests to specified routes, maintains a list of cache keys to invalidate, and exports createCacheInvalidationMiddleware function. Include comprehensive tests.
existing_patterns: src/middleware/rate-limiter.ts:createRateLimiterMiddleware factory pattern with config interface, returns NextResponse from request handler function
src/middleware/rate-limiter.test.ts:vitest with describe/it/expect/vi, afterEach cleanup hooks, destroy() pattern for teardown, fake timers for time-based tests
